mapper.select:
select p.post_id as postId, p.member_id as memberId, m.name as authorName, m.nickname as authorNickname, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, p.title as title, p.content as content, p.emotion_id as emotionId,
group_concat(concat('#', h.hashtag) order by ph.post_hashtag_id separator ' ') as tags, coalesce((select count(*) from user_post_like upl where upl.post_id = p.post_id), 0) as likes, coalesce(( select count(*) from comment_tbl c where c.post_id = p.post_id and c.deleted_yn = 'N' and not exists ( select 1 from admin_action_logs log where log.target_type = 'COMMENT' and log.target_id = c.comment_id and log.action_type = 'HIDE' and log.log_id = ( select max(log_id) from admin_action_logs where target_type = 'COMMENT' and target_id = c.comment_id and action_type in ('HIDE', 'RESTORE') ) ) ), 0) as comments, p.created_at as createdAt from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id left join post_hashtag ph on p.post_id = ph.post_id left join hashtag h on ph.hashtag_id = h.hashtag_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and ( lower(p.content) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.name) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.nickname) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(h.hashtag) like concat('%', lower(replace(#{query}, '#', '')), '%') ) group by p.post_id, p.member_id, m.name, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url, p.title, p.content, p.emotion_id, p.created_at order by p.created_at desc limit 50

select m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, CASE WHEN f.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as following from members m left join follow_tbl f on f.follower_member_id = #{loginId} and f.following_member_id = m.member_id where lower(m.name) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.nickname) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.email) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') order by m.name asc limit 50

select m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, coalesce(fc.followerCount, 0) as followerCount, CASE WHEN f.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as following from members m left join ( select following_member_id, count(*) as followerCount from follow_tbl group by following_member_id ) fc on fc.following_member_id = m.member_id left join follow_tbl f on f.follower_member_id = #{loginId} and f.following_member_id = m.member_id order by followerCount desc, m.member_id desc limit #{limit}

select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as postCount from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id left join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id where lower(h.hashtag) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') and p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag order by postCount desc limit 50

choose.when: select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as useCount from hashtag h join post_hashtag ph on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag order by useCount desc, h.hashtag asc limit #{limit}
choose.otherwise: select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as useCount from hashtag h join post_hashtag ph on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.visibility = 'PUBLIC' and p.created_at >= #{from} group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag order by useCount desc, h.hashtag asc limit #{limit}
